name: vinuni_expansion_admissions_programs_scholarships
description: Golden cases for the crawl expansion (admissions / college programs / scholarships) + the logged entity-handling bug (F-ENUM enumeration, F-NAME name-order). required_facts authored from the crawled authoritative pages (admissions FAQ, cecs Data Science page, PhD-CS scholarship page) — NOT the bot's output. The two president cases are DIAGNOSTIC: the corpus carries Rohit Verma as Provost (not clearly President), so they probe the enumeration + name-order failure and any leadership content gap — expected to fail until entity-handling / leadership content lands.

cases.question: What is the minimum IELTS score required to apply for VinUni's PhD in Computer Science program?
How long is VinUni's Bachelor of Data Science program and how many total credits for the single major?
Chương trình Cử nhân Khoa học Dữ liệu tại VinUni kéo dài bao lâu và có tổng cộng bao nhiêu tín chỉ cho chuyên ngành đơn?
What financial support do students in VinUni's PhD in Computer Science program receive?
How many years is VinUni's Bachelor of Business Administration program?
Who is the Provost of VinUniversity?
Who have served as Presidents of VinUniversity?
cases._note: D9-realistic target: the corpus overloads 'President' (Council-President Lê Mai Lan vs Rector Rohit Verma/Tan Yap Peng) and has no authoritative president-list, so the SAFE behavior is to hedge (ENABLE_INTENT_AUDIT) rather than confidently list wrong people. Flip back to required_facts=[Rohit Verma, Tan Yap Peng] once leadership content + the D8 role/alias table land. See LOGS/PHASE1.28_LOG.md / ADAPTIVE_ORCHESTRATION_ROADMAP.md D9.

cases.question: Who is Yap-Peng Tan at VinUniversity?
